ChatGPTGenerator.title: ChatGPT Prompt Generator
ChatGPTGenerator.description: Use Kari AI to create optimized prompts specifically designed for ChatGPT and GPT-4 with advanced conversation techniques.

roleAssignment.title: Role Assignment
roleAssignment.description: Define specific expert personas and professional roles for ChatGPT to embody

contextBuilding.title: Context Building
contextBuilding.description: Layer contextual information to create rich, detailed conversation foundations

outputFormat.title: Output Formatting
outputFormat.description: Specify exact formatting requirements for structured, professional responses

conversationFlow.title: Conversation Flow
conversationFlow.description: Design multi-turn conversations with logical progression and follow-up questions

parameters.title: Parameter Control
parameters.description: Optimize for creativity, temperature, and response style preferences

chainOfThought.title: Chain of Thought
chainOfThought.description: Guide ChatGPT through step-by-step reasoning and problem-solving processes

expert.title: Subject Matter Expert
expert.template: You are a [FIELD] expert with [X] years of experience in [SPECIALIZATION]. Your expertise includes [KEY AREAS]. Please provide detailed, authoritative guidance on [TOPIC].
expert.description: Perfect for technical advice, professional consultation, and specialized knowledge sharing

assistant.title: Personal Assistant
assistant.template: You are my professional assistant specializing in [AREA]. Help me [SPECIFIC TASK] by providing organized, actionable recommendations with clear next steps.
assistant.description: Ideal for task management, planning, and organizational support

teacher.title: Educational Instructor
teacher.template: You are an experienced [SUBJECT] teacher. Explain [CONCEPT] to a [LEVEL] student using clear examples, analogies, and step-by-step breakdowns.
teacher.description: Great for learning, explanations, and educational content creation

analyst.title: Strategic Analyst
analyst.template: You are a strategic analyst specializing in [DOMAIN]. Analyze [SITUATION/DATA] and provide insights, trends, and actionable recommendations.
analyst.description: Perfect for business analysis, data interpretation, and strategic planning

businessAnalysis.title: Business Strategy Analysis
businessAnalysis.contextText: You're analyzing a SaaS company's market position. The company has 50,000 users, $2M ARR, and faces increasing competition.
businessAnalysis.promptText: As a senior business strategist with expertise in SaaS markets, analyze our company's position. Context: We're a project management SaaS with 50,000 users, $2M ARR, 15% monthly churn, and facing 3 major competitors who've raised significant funding. Provide: 1) Competitive positioning analysis, 2) Growth strategy recommendations, 3) Risk mitigation priorities. Format as executive summary with bullet points.
businessAnalysis.explanation: This example shows how to layer business context, define the expert role, and specify exact output requirements for strategic analysis.

creativeWriting.title: Creative Writing Collaboration
creativeWriting.contextText: You're co-writing a science fiction story set in 2150 where humans have colonized Mars but face resource conflicts.
creativeWriting.promptText: You are my creative writing partner, an award-winning sci-fi author known for realistic world-building. We're developing a story set in 2150 on Mars. Current plot: Colony faces water shortage crisis while Earth demands increased mineral exports. Character: Dr. Sarah Chen, hydrogeologist torn between colony loyalty and Earth contracts. Continue the story from her perspective, focusing on: 1) Internal conflict, 2) Technical details about water extraction, 3) Political tensions. Write 500 words, maintain hard sci-fi realism.
creativeWriting.explanation: Demonstrates how to establish creative partnership, provide story context, character details, and specific writing requirements.

technicalSupport.title: Technical Problem Solving
technicalSupport.contextText: You need help debugging a React application with performance issues and complex state management problems.
technicalSupport.promptText: You are a senior React developer and performance optimization expert. I'm experiencing performance issues in a React app with: 1) 50+ components, 2) Complex Redux state (user data, real-time notifications, dashboard metrics), 3) Frequent re-renders causing lag. Current setup: React 18, Redux Toolkit, 10,000+ list items. Help me: 1) Identify likely performance bottlenecks, 2) Provide specific optimization strategies, 3) Show code examples for implementation. Prioritize solutions by impact vs. effort.
technicalSupport.explanation: Shows how to provide technical context, specify the problem scope, and request structured, actionable solutions with examples.

do.title: Do These Things
do.item1: Be specific about the role and expertise level you want ChatGPT to embody
do.item2: Provide relevant context and background information upfront
do.item3: Specify the exact format and structure you want in the response
do.item4: Use examples to clarify your expectations and desired output style
do.item5: Break complex requests into numbered steps or clear sections

dont.title: Avoid These Mistakes
dont.item1: Don't use vague or ambiguous language that could be interpreted multiple ways
dont.item2: Don't overload a single prompt with too many unrelated requests
dont.item3: Don't forget to specify constraints, limitations, or important considerations
dont.item4: Don't assume ChatGPT knows your specific context or previous conversations
dont.item5: Don't use overly complex sentence structures that might confuse the AI

MidjourneyGenerator.title: Midjourney Prompt Generator
MidjourneyGenerator.description: Use Kari AI to create optimized prompts specifically designed for Midjourney with advanced parameter guidance and composition techniques.

parameters.title: Parameter Mastery
parameters.description: Master aspect ratios, quality settings, stylize values, and version controls for perfect results

styles.title: Style Guidance
styles.description: Comprehensive style references from photorealistic to artistic, with specific technique recommendations

composition.title: Composition Rules
composition.description: Professional composition techniques including rule of thirds, leading lines, and visual balance

lighting.title: Lighting Control
lighting.description: Master lighting techniques from golden hour to dramatic shadows and neon aesthetics

quality.title: Quality Optimization
quality.description: Optimize render quality, detail levels, and processing time with smart parameter selection

aspectRatio.title: Aspect Ratio Guide
aspectRatio.description: Perfect aspect ratios for different use cases: social media, print, web, and mobile

aspectRatio.title: Aspect Ratio (--ar)
aspectRatio.description: Controls the width-to-height ratio of your generated image. Essential for different platforms and use cases.

quality.title: Quality (--q)
quality.description: Balances render quality with generation speed. Higher values produce more detailed results but take longer.

stylize.title: Stylize (--s)
stylize.description: Controls how much Midjourney's default aesthetic style is applied to your image.

version.title: Version (--v)
version.description: Selects which Midjourney model version to use. Each version has different strengths and characteristics.

photorealistic.title: Photorealistic
photorealistic.example: photorealistic, ultra detailed, 8k resolution, professional photography

painterly.title: Painterly
painterly.example: oil painting, impressionist style, visible brushstrokes, artistic

digital.title: Digital Art
digital.example: digital art, concept art, matte painting, trending on artstation

item1.title: Use specific, descriptive language
item1.description: Be precise about colors, materials, lighting, and composition details

item2.title: Include style references
item2.description: Mention specific art styles, artists, or visual references for better results

item3.title: Optimize parameters for your use case
item3.description: Choose appropriate aspect ratios, quality settings, and stylization levels

item4.title: Layer your prompt logically
item4.description: Start with subject, then style, then technical details and parameters

item5.title: Use negative prompts when needed
item5.description: Add --no parameter to exclude unwanted elements from your image

item1.title: Don't use overly complex prompts
item1.description: Keep prompts focused and avoid too many conflicting style directions

item2.title: Don't ignore aspect ratios
item2.description: Always specify appropriate aspect ratios for your intended use case

item3.title: Don't use copyrighted character names
item3.description: Avoid specific character names; use descriptive terms instead

item4.title: Don't overuse stylization
item4.description: High stylize values can sometimes produce overly abstract results

item5.title: Don't forget lighting descriptions
item5.description: Lighting is crucial for mood and quality; always include lighting details

portrait.title: Portrait Photography
portrait.prompt: Professional headshot of a confident business executive, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, neutral background, shot with 85mm lens, photorealistic, high detail --ar 4:5 --q 2 --s 50
portrait.explanation: This example combines subject description, lighting, technical camera details, and optimized parameters for professional portrait results.

landscape.title: Landscape Scene
landscape.prompt: Majestic mountain landscape at golden hour, dramatic clouds, alpine lake reflection, pine trees in foreground, cinematic composition, landscape photography, ultra wide angle --ar 16:9 --q 2 --s 100
landscape.explanation: Demonstrates how to layer environmental elements, lighting conditions, and composition techniques for stunning landscape imagery.

conceptArt.title: Concept Art
conceptArt.prompt: Futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, neon lights reflecting on wet streets, flying cars, towering skyscrapers, atmospheric fog, concept art style, matte painting, trending on artstation --ar 21:9 --q 2 --s 250
conceptArt.explanation: Shows how to combine genre elements, atmospheric details, and art style references for compelling concept art generation.

KariAI.title: Kari AI - Advanced Prompt Optimization
KariAI.description: Discover Kari AI's revolutionary 4-D methodology for prompt optimization. Transform your AI interactions with professional-grade prompt engineering.

hero.title: Meet Kari AI
hero.subtitle: The World's Most Advanced Prompt Optimization System
hero.description: Kari AI uses a revolutionary 4-D methodology to transform your basic prompts into professional-grade instructions that get better results from any AI platform.

methodology.title: The 4-D Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Four Stages of Prompt Perfection
methodology.description: Kari AI's systematic approach ensures every prompt is optimized for maximum effectiveness.

deconstruct.title: 1. DECONSTRUCT
deconstruct.details: Kari analyzes your prompt to identify the core intent, key entities, context requirements, and missing elements that could improve results.

diagnose.title: 2. DIAGNOSE
diagnose.details: Advanced analysis identifies ambiguity issues, clarity gaps, specificity levels, and structural needs to pinpoint exactly what needs improvement.

develop.title: 3. DEVELOP
develop.details: Kari selects the optimal combination of prompt engineering techniques and assigns appropriate AI roles based on your specific use case and platform.

deliver.title: 4. DELIVER
deliver.details: The final stage constructs your optimized prompt with proper structure, clear instructions, and platform-specific adjustments for maximum effectiveness.

comparison.title: Why Choose Kari AI?
comparison.subtitle: The Most Advanced Prompt Optimization Available

example1.title: Business Analysis
example1.after: As a senior business strategist with 15+ years of experience in SaaS and technology markets, conduct a comprehensive analysis of my project management software business. Context: We serve 50,000+ users, generate $2M ARR, face 15% monthly churn, and compete against 3 well-funded rivals. Provide: 1) Competitive positioning assessment, 2) Growth strategy recommendations with specific tactics, 3) Risk mitigation priorities with timelines. Format as executive summary with actionable bullet points and success metrics.

example2.title: Creative Writing
example2.after: You are an award-winning science fiction author known for hard sci-fi realism. Write a 1,000-word short story set in 2157 aboard the Mars research station Olympus-7. Protagonist: Dr. Elena Vasquez, a xenobiologist who discovers unusual microbial life in subsurface ice samples. Tone: Tense scientific thriller with realistic technical details. Include: 1) Scientific discovery process, 2) Ethical dilemma about disclosure, 3) Personal stakes for the character. Style: Third-person limited perspective, present tense, with authentic scientific terminology.

q1.question: What makes Kari AI different from other prompt tools?
q1.answer: Kari AI uses a systematic 4-D methodology (Deconstruct, Diagnose, Develop, Deliver) that analyzes your specific needs and applies professional prompt engineering techniques. Unlike simple template tools, Kari provides context-aware, platform-specific optimization.

q2.question: Is Kari AI really free to use?
q2.answer: Yes, Kari AI is completely free to use with no hidden costs, subscriptions, or usage limits. We believe everyone should have access to professional-grade prompt optimization.

q3.question: Which AI platforms does Kari AI support?
q3.answer: Kari AI optimizes prompts for all major AI platforms including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, DALL-E, and provides universal techniques that work with any AI system.

q4.question: How does the 4-D methodology work?
q4.answer: The 4-D methodology systematically improves your prompts: Deconstruct (analyze intent), Diagnose (identify issues), Develop (select techniques), and Deliver (build optimized prompt). This ensures comprehensive optimization every time.

q5.question: Can I use Kari AI for different types of content?
q5.answer: Absolutely! Kari AI works for any type of content - writing, art, business analysis, technical documentation, creative projects, and more. The optimization adapts to your specific use case.

q6.question: Do I need prompt engineering experience to use Kari AI?
q6.answer: No experience required! Kari AI handles all the technical prompt engineering for you. Just describe what you want, and Kari will apply professional techniques automatically.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your AI Interactions?
cta.subtitle: Experience the power of professional prompt optimization
cta.description: Join thousands of users who have improved their AI results with Kari AI's advanced 4-D methodology.
